# Pull Request

## Human Summary

Explain what changed in plain language and why the change is safe to review.

## Verification

List commands run and results.

```bash
node scripts/check-dev-kit.mjs
node scripts/check-fixtures.mjs
node scripts/check-launch-readiness.mjs .
node scripts/check-conversation-drift.mjs .
node scripts/check-guided-delivery-loop.mjs .
node scripts/check-change-boundary.mjs .
node scripts/check-baseline-state.mjs .
```

## License / Commercial Boundary

Confirm whether the change touches license wording, commercial-use wording, attribution, distribution terms, or release materials.

## Next-Step Boundary

List follow-up suggestions separately from this PR scope. Do not treat suggestions as approval to continue.
